items.label: Johto-only challenge: team ≤ Lv 58
items.note: For 'Until Next Time... Smell Ya Later!' — defeat Blue in Set battle style, using only Johto Pokémon that never exceed Lv 58 in battle, and without using any Pack items.

items.label: Recommended counter
items.note: Lv 58 is a high cap, so use your main team. Blue mirrors his Gen-1 roster across many types, so come with a diverse, multi-type team.
